section_name: Evaluation or treatment by private company authorized.
text:
The provisions of NRS 484C.340 , 484C.350 or 484C.360 do not prohibit a court from:

(1) Requiring an evaluation pursuant to NRS 484C.350 to be conducted by an evaluation center that is administered by a private company if the company meets the standards of the State Board of Health pursuant to NRS 484C.310 ; or

(2) Ordering the offender to attend a program of treatment that is administered by a private company.

NEVADA 24/7 SOBRIETY AND DRUG MONITORING PROGRAM
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 484C
##### § 484C.370 — Evaluation or treatment by private company authorized.

The provisions of NRS 484C.340 , 484C.350 or 484C.360 do not prohibit a court from:

(1) Requiring an evaluation pursuant to NRS 484C.350 to be conducted by an evaluation center that is administered by a private company if the company meets the standards of the State Board of Health pursuant to NRS 484C.310 ; or

(2) Ordering the offender to attend a program of treatment that is administered by a private company.

NEVADA 24/7 SOBRIETY AND DRUG MONITORING PROGRAM

Requiring an evaluation pursuant to NRS 484C.350 to be conducted by an evaluation center that is administered by a private company if the company meets the standards of the State Board of Health pursuant to NRS 484C.310 ; or
Ordering the offender to attend a program of treatment that is administered by a private company.
